title: Founder, Chief Executive Officer, and Cognitive Architect
summary: Artan Davoodi founded Neuroartan to build ICOS as a cognitive operating system for reflection, continuity, profile intelligence, and governed human-computer interaction.
biography: Artan leads Neuroartan from the founder seat, shaping the product doctrine, public language, and system architecture behind ICOS.
His work connects thought, sound, software, design, and governance into one continuous operating architecture rather than treating them as separate disciplines.
The public founder profile exists to make the company’s leadership, product direction, and continuity logic legible while the wider executive team is still being built.
mandate: Set institutional direction, protect product truth, approve high-impact decisions, and keep Neuroartan’s strategy, governance, and public posture coherent as the company matures.
